sender.name: Michael Torres
sender.title: Vice President of Strategic Partnerships
sender.address:
1800 K Street NW, Suite 900
Washington, DC 20006

subject: Strategic Advisory Engagement -- Operational Efficiency Program
body_paragraphs: Thank you for the productive conversation at the Healthcare Operations Summit last week. Following our discussion about Northwind's operational efficiency goals for the coming fiscal year, I am writing to formally propose a strategic advisory engagement between Cascade Consulting Group and Northwind Healthcare Solutions.

Based on our preliminary assessment of your current operations and the benchmarking data you shared, we believe there is significant opportunity to reduce patient processing cycle times by 25-30% while simultaneously improving staff satisfaction scores. Our Healthcare Operations Practice has delivered similar results for three comparable health systems in the Northeast region over the past 18 months.

The engagement would proceed in three phases over 16 weeks: a 4-week diagnostic assessment, an 8-week redesign and pilot phase, and a 4-week implementation support and measurement period. Our team would embed two senior consultants on-site during the diagnostic and pilot phases, with additional remote analytical support.

I have enclosed a detailed scope of work document outlining deliverables, timeline, investment, and team composition. Our proposed fees for the full engagement are $285,000, inclusive of all travel and expenses. This reflects a 15% consideration from our standard rates given the potential for a multi-site expansion of the program.

I would welcome the opportunity to present this proposal to your leadership team. Please let me know if the week of April 20 works for a 60-minute presentation, either in person at your Boston office or via video conference.
signature_title:
Vice President of Strategic Partnerships
Cascade Consulting Group
